criticalFindings.description: Risk score formula mismatch detected: 50 files have incorrect risk scores
criticalFindings.suggestedFix: Database uses Worker formula (45 matches) but MCP tool uses different formula (0 matches). Standardize on one formula in both locations: code-analysis.processor.ts lines 530-534 and get_file_health.ts lines 92-96

recommendations: PRIORITY 1: Standardize risk score formula across worker and MCP tools
- Option A: Use Worker formula (simpler, scales down by /100)
- Option B: Use MCP Tool formula (better risk distribution, scales complexity by /10)
- Recommended: Option B (MCP Tool formula) for better granularity
PRIORITY 3: Convert this validation script into a Jest test suite for CI/CD integration
PRIORITY 4: Consider implementing AST-based complexity calculation for better accuracy
